title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers published a walkthrough on hidden charges that persist after deleting AWS resources, including RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways. The video covers a cleanup checklist for developers to identify surprise charges and recommends setting up billing alarms to avoid unexpected bills.
